decision_records.rationale: Selected 'wp.road.fusioncode.segment_topology.v1' because the executable plan resolves to that workflow pattern. Candidate scoring remains attached for audit comparison; policy-only winner before execution was 'wp.typhoon.road.default'.

Selected 'catalog.typhoon.road' with score=0.238000 using deterministic weighted scoring. Major factors: success_rate/accuracy (strongest), data_quality and stability, then freshness and reuse, then speed and cost. Runner-up 'catalog.flood.road' score=0.231500; winner had higher weighted sum on the major factors.

Selected 'fresh_execution' with score=0.131000 using deterministic weighted scoring. Major factors: success_rate/accuracy (strongest), data_quality and stability, then freshness and reuse, then speed and cost.

Selected 'kg_defaults_only' with score=0.547000 using deterministic weighted scoring. Major factors: success_rate/accuracy (strongest), data_quality and stability, then freshness and reuse, then speed and cost.

Selected 'osp.road.fused.v1' with score=0.170000 using deterministic weighted scoring. Major factors: success_rate/accuracy (strongest), data_quality and stability, then freshness and reuse, then speed and cost.

artifact_reuse.rationale: No reusable artifact candidates were found in planner retrieval context.

repair_records.message: Primary execution failed: Unknown column geometry
Switched data source id to catalog.flood.road

algo.fusion.road.v1.label: Split Angle Threshold
algo.fusion.road.v1.description: Split lines at sharp turns: angles below this threshold trigger a split.

algo.fusion.road.v1.label: Snap Tolerance
algo.fusion.road.v1.description: Endpoint snap tolerance used when normalizing line endpoints.

algo.fusion.road.v1.label: Match Buffer Distance
algo.fusion.road.v1.description: Buffer radius for candidate matching between OSM and reference lines.

algo.fusion.road.v1.label: Max Hausdorff Distance
algo.fusion.road.v1.description: Maximum Hausdorff distance allowed to consider two lines as a match.

algo.fusion.road.v1.label: Dedupe Buffer Distance
algo.fusion.road.v1.description: Buffer distance used during post-fusion deduplication.
